summary: Attribution + Distribution Phase (Phase 5.5) Testing Complete. All 15 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verification confirmed all referral tracking features: (1) Share page /v/{slug} stores referral_source in localStorage with job_id, slug, character_name, timestamp. (2) Social proof banner shows 'X people continued this story - Be the next to decide what happens'. (3) Urgency badge 'Trending now' appears after 4 seconds. (4) Share & Earn Credits section displays +5/+15/+25 reward tiers. (5) 4 share buttons: WA, X, IG, Link. (6) Mid-page hook 'This story has no ending...' present. (7) Story hook (cliffhanger) section present. (8) Continue button navigates to /app/story-video-studio with prefilled prompt. (9) Dashboard return banner and streak display working. (10) Email nudge admin endpoint shows email_service_active=false (RESEND_API_KEY not set - expected).
critical_code_review_comments: PublicCreation.js correctly stores referral_source in localStorage at lines 63-72 with job_id, slug, character_name, timestamp
Signup.js correctly reads referral_source and calls POST /api/growth/signup-referral-reward at lines 233-249
AuthCallback.js correctly reads referral_source and calls POST /api/growth/signup-referral-reward at lines 61-76

growth_analytics.py signup-referral-reward endpoint at lines 415-476 correctly: (a) returns success:false for nonexistent job, (b) awards +25 credits for valid referral, (c) prevents self-referral, (d) prevents duplicate rewards
retention_routes.py admin/email-nudges endpoint at lines 420-439 correctly shows email_service_active field
email_service.py at /app/backend/services/email_service.py has is_email_enabled() and send_nudge_email() functions
24-hour window check in Signup.js and AuthCallback.js ensures stale referrals are ignored (Date.now() - timestamp < 86400000)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Attribution + Distribution Phase (Phase 5.5) verified: (1) Share page /v/{slug} stores referral_source in localStorage with {job_id, slug, character_name, timestamp}. (2) Signup.js reads referral_source after successful signup and calls POST /api/growth/signup-referral-reward with referrer_job_id and new_user_id, then removes from localStorage. (3) AuthCallback.js does the same for Google auth. (4) POST /api/growth/signup-referral-reward: returns success:false for nonexistent job, awards +25 credits for valid referral, prevents self-referral (referrer_id == new_user_id), prevents duplicate rewards via reward_key. (5) GET /api/retention/admin/email-nudges shows email_service_active field (currently false since RESEND_API_KEY not set). (6) Email service module at /app/backend/services/email_service.py has is_email_enabled() and send_nudge_email() functions with HTML template. (7) Share page UI: social proof banner, urgency badge after 4s, share buttons (WA/X/IG/Link), mid-page hook, story hook cliffhanger. (8) Continue button navigates to /app/story-video-studio with prefilled prompt. (9) Dashboard return banner and streak display still working. (10) K-factor API and streak API still working from previous phases.

Referral_Source_LocalStorage.details: Share page stores {job_id, slug, character_name, timestamp} in localStorage.referral_source

Signup_Referral_Attribution.details: Signup.js calls POST /api/growth/signup-referral-reward after successful signup

Google_Auth_Referral_Attribution.details: AuthCallback.js calls POST /api/growth/signup-referral-reward after Google signin

Signup_Referral_Reward_Nonexistent_Job.details: Returns success:false for nonexistent referrer job

Signup_Referral_Duplicate_Prevention.details: Prevents duplicate referral rewards via reward_key

Share_Page_Social_Proof.details: Shows 'X people continued this story - Be the next to decide what happens'

Share_Page_Mid_Hook.details: 'This story has no ending...' with Continue button

Continue_To_Studio_Flow.details: Continue button navigates to /app/story-video-studio with prefilled prompt

K_Factor_API.details: GET /api/growth/k-factor returns user and platform_7d metrics

Return_Banner.details: Dashboard shows return banner with cliffhanger

mocked_apis.note: Email sending via Resend is NOT active because RESEND_API_KEY is not set. The email_service.py is_email_enabled() returns False. This is expected — emails are queued but not sent.
